text.title: Value Stream Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the value-stream-management methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: min_30_items
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Flow analysis must use ≥30 completed items in the last 90 days; smaller samples yield noise, not signal.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `min-30-items` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: bottleneck_singular
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Investment must target ONE bottleneck per quarter — parallel investment dilutes signal.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `bottleneck-singular` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: flow_efficiency_reported
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Flow efficiency (Process Time / Lead Time) must appear on every VSM report.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `flow-efficiency-reported` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: percentile_not_average
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Lead Time must be reported as p50 + p85 + p95 — never as a simple mean.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `percentile-not-average` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: timestamps_instrumented
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Each step must be timestamped at entry + exit — manual log = unreliable.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `timestamps-instrumented` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-value-stream-management.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
